rationale: Educ. Code §21.210 governs teacher resignation under term contracts. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: A teacher employed under a term contract with a school district may relinquish the teaching position and leave the employment of the district at the end of a school year without penalty by filing a written resignation with the board of trustees or the board's designee not later than the 45th day before the first day of instruction of the following school year.
_note: Rule text concerns educator contract resignation; proposed change concerns homestead exemption amount. No overlap.
